## Week in Review: 2026-06-08 to 2026-06-14

**One Nation** led search interest this week with an average score of 43.4.
The strongest combined search-and-sentiment score belonged to **One Nation**.

### Party Breakdown

- **Labor**: Avg interest 4.7 (+73.7% WoW), sentiment: neutral (-0.09)
- **Liberal**: Avg interest 2.4 (0.0% WoW), sentiment: positive (+0.17)
- **Greens**: Avg interest 1.9 (-13.3% WoW), sentiment: neutral (+0.00)
- **One Nation**: Avg interest 43.4 (+171.4% WoW), sentiment: positive (+0.19)
